title: cert_watch daemon — L5 auto-ingest polling config
raw_compliance: raw#9 hexa-only raw#10 proof-chain raw#11 snake_case raw#15 no-hardcode
purpose: Poll cert paths at fixed interval, detect new/modified *.json, invoke meta2_hashchain_verify on change (or MOCK if tool absent), append proof-chain to cert_ingest_log.json.
notes: Fingerprint = {mtime, size}; content sha256 computed on change
First scan seeds baseline; no events emitted on S1
